title: Jompa and the Giggle Treasure
setting: A bright land with castles, friendly dragons, and sparkly magic. A hidden treasure waits somewhere nearby.
overallGoal: Jompa wants to find the hidden treasure and keep everyone smiling.

monster.name: Bloop the Bubble Dragon
monster.description: A chubby dragon who sneezes bubbles and loves jokes.

scenarios.name: The Shiny Map
scenarios.description: Jompa finds a shiny map near a small castle. The map shows a path to hidden treasure. It looks fun and safe.
scenarios.notesForGM: Let Jompa decide how to read or follow the map. Keep it simple and exciting.

scenarios.name: Magic Bridge
scenarios.description: A wiggly bridge crosses a tiny river. The bridge giggles when stepped on. Jompa must cross carefully.
scenarios.notesForGM: Offer playful choices like tiptoeing or holding a rope. No danger.

scenarios.name: Bubble Clues
scenarios.description: Floating bubbles pop with funny sounds. One bubble shows a dragon tail. Someone silly must live nearby.
scenarios.notesForGM: Hint at the monster in a fun way. Build curiosity, not fear.

scenarios.name: Meet Bloop
scenarios.description: Jompa meets Bloop the Bubble Dragon by the treasure cave. Bloop guards the treasure but wants a friend. Bubbles fill the air.
scenarios.notesForGM: Make the encounter silly. Let kindness or jokes solve the problem.

scenarios.name: Treasure Time
scenarios.description: The treasure is shared with everyone. There are shiny toys and yummy snacks. Everyone feels happy and safe.
scenarios.notesForGM: End calmly and cozy. Celebrate Jompa's success.

designNotesForGM: Keep scenes short and playful. Introduce the monster gently with hints, then make the meeting friendly. Avoid scary moments and finish with warmth and praise.
